economic_notes: Bonaparte First Nation has two Government Business Enterprises: 1049280 BC Ltd. and Bonaparte Sales Limited Partnership. Assets were damaged in a natural disaster in summer 2018 with no assessment made. COVID-19 impacts ongoing.
notes: Audit is qualified due to CMHC social housing tangible capital assets being amortized at a rate equivalent to annual principal reduction of related long-term debt rather than over estimated useful lives as required by PSAS. This qualification also applied to the prior year. Total government transfers estimated as ISC net ($3,851,890) + FNHA ($801,822) + Gov of Canada ($562,368) + CMHC ($73,713) + Province of BC ($1,520,427) + ISC recoveries net adjustment = approximately $6,835,658 calculated from statement lines excluding interest, other income, billable services, rental revenue, GBE income, and other funding sources. RBC loans are technically due on demand due to inability to provide financial statements to RBC. No schedule of remuneration provided. The auditor firm name is not fully identified beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants, Kamloops, British Columbia'.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
